skills.name: repository-auditor
skills.description: Complete read-only codebase investigation producing 9 structured reports and a scorecard.

skills.name: repository-surgeon
skills.description: Safe, evidence-based refactoring from audit findings with build/test verification.

skills.name: documentation-architect
skills.description: Produces comprehensive, accurate documentation grounded in post-refactor code.

skills.name: repository-guardian
skills.description: Final independent Staff Engineer-style review re-verifying all pipeline output.

skills.name: repository-orchestrator
skills.description: Single entry point coordinating all four pipeline stages.
